description: commentanalyzer.googleapis.com hosts Google/Jigsaw's Perspective Comment Analyzer API, which scores text for moderation-related attributes such as toxicity and accepts score feedback. It is part of the Perspective API service used to analyze comment text and improve moderation workflows.
summary: One HTTP API surface: the Perspective Comment Analyzer REST API at `https://commentanalyzer.googleapis.com/v1alpha1`, documented with an OpenAPI spec and authenticated by either a Perspective API key or Google OAuth 2.0 token.
